marketRegime.summary: VIX is moderate at 17.2, SPY trend is mildly supportive, and shock-day risk is off.
marketRegime.insight: System Insight: Multiple entry-grade setups available; prioritize clean entries over extended momentum.

favorable: ITM structure supports follow-through if trend holds.
